pi_items.source: Mathematical calculation based on standard PMT formula requested in task description (485000, 0.0725/12, 60)
Mathematical calculation based on loan parameters (485000 * 0.0725 / 12)
Mathematical calculation based on true PMT and term (9660.89 * 60 - 485000)

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to build a 60-month loan amortization schedule for a $485,000 commercial equipment loan with a 7.25% annual interest rate. The spreadsheet template is generated synthetically at runtime. Verified properties include the initial principal ($485,000), rate (7.25%), term (60 months), and correctly calculated Month 1 Interest ($2,930.21). However, the task metadata claims the expected monthly payment (PMT) is $9,662.65 and the expected total interest is $94,759.00. Both are contradicted by standard financial calculations: using the standard Excel-equivalent PMT formula over 60 months with a monthly rate of 7.25%/12 on $485,000 yields a true PMT of $9,660.89, which results in a true total interest of $94,653.42.
